title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: A Former Top Trump Official Is Going After Prediction Markets
items.description: As the battle over prediction markets rages on, Mick Mulvaney is leading a new coalition that calls these platforms illegal gambling.

items.title: Best AirPods (2026): Which Apple Headphones Should You Buy?
items.description: From the AirPods Pro to the AirPods Max, these are the best headphones for your iPhone and beyond.

items.title: The Data Centers Have Arrived at the Edge of the Arctic Circle
items.description: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.

items.title: When the Internet Goes Dark, the Truth Goes With It
items.description: Palestinian journalist Plestia Alaqad on bearing witness, the fragile power of social media, and why documenting lived reality matters more than ever.

items.title: OpenAI reveals more details about its agreement with the Pentagon
items.description: By CEO Sam Altman’s own admission, OpenAI’s deal with the Department of Defense was “definitely rushed,” and “the optics don’t look good.”

items.title: Let’s explore the best alternatives to Discord
items.description: With many users feeling uneasy about Discord's new age verification requirement, here are some alternatives that could be worth exploring.

items.title: Polymarket saw $529M traded on bets tied to bombing of Iran
items.description: Six newly-created accounts made a profit of $1 million by correctly betting that the U.S. would strike Iran by February 28.

items.title: Google looks to tackle longstanding RCS spam in India — but not alone
items.description: Google is integrating carrier-level filtering into RCS in India through a partnership with Airtel to strengthen protections against spam.

items.title: Lenovo’s Latest Wacky Concepts Include a Laptop With a Built-in Portable Monitor
items.description: At MWC 2026, the company also showed off a dual-screen Yoga Book with 3D capabilities, and the Legion Go Fold—a gaming handheld with a folding screen ...

items.title: Investors spill what they aren’t looking for anymore in AI SaaS companies
items.description: TechCrunch spoke with VCs to learn what investors aren't looking for in AI SaaS startups anymore.
